title: codereview pass 2: CCA Kconfig
description: Second review pass: 1. Kconfig added but no code uses LICHEN_LORA_CCA_ENABLE or TIMEOUT yet (incomplete chunk). 2. No update to CMakeLists or hal.c for radio model support. 3. Should have prompt in help for when to enable (only on real radios). 4. Missing dependency chain to LICHEN_HAS_LORA_CAD or similar. (project-LICHEN-da2q.15.7)
